**Publisher name:**
<!-- e.g. Hugging Face -->

**Domain:**
<!-- e.g. huggingface.co -->

**Catalog URL:**
<!-- e.g. https://example.com/.well-known/ai-catalog.json -->

**Resource types found:**
<!-- e.g. mcp-server, a2a-agent, ai-skill, ai-registry, openapi -->

**Notes:**
<!-- Any relevant context about this publisher -->

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Catalog is publicly accessible (no authentication required)
- [ ] I've verified the URL returns valid JSON
- [ ] This publisher is not already listed in INDEX.md
